name_en: In Stock 24A Retro Briefcase Black|Actual Product Photos
name_cn:
In Stock 24A Retro Briefcase Black|Actual Product Photos
So cool🔥 A hidden gem briefcase with a strong vintage vibe~ The leather is made of patent lambskin, with five compartments inside. The capacity is amazing🤓 A bag that looks good on everyone, really really really hard to get. The handle is very casual and cool, giving off a powerful CEO vibe!! Decided to grab it, let's go❤️
size:23*36*7cm
